name: lighthouse-firewall
description: OctoBus package for Tencent Cloud Lighthouse firewall rule query, create, delete, modify, and template apply APIs.

Tencent_Lighthouse_FIREWALL.Tencent_Ligh.name: list-firewall-rules
Tencent_Lighthouse_FIREWALL.Tencent_Ligh.description: List Lighthouse firewall rules for an instance.

Tencent_Lighthouse_FIREWALL.Tencent_Ligh.name: apply-firewall-template
Tencent_Lighthouse_FIREWALL.Tencent_Ligh.description: Apply Lighthouse firewall template rules to instances.

Tencent_Lighthouse_FIREWALL.Tencent_Ligh.name: block-ip
Tencent_Lighthouse_FIREWALL.Tencent_Ligh.description: Block IPv4 source addresses by creating DENY firewall rules.

Tencent_Lighthouse_FIREWALL.Tencent_Ligh.name: unblock-ip
Tencent_Lighthouse_FIREWALL.Tencent_Ligh.description: Remove matching Lighthouse firewall block rules.
